description: Queen Patch 8 (25 March 2020) — Gathering Changes, Faction Flagging in Yellow Zones, Outlands Shrine Changes, Hellgate Changes, Combat Balance Changes (Daggers, Frost Staffs, Arcane Staffs, Bows, Hammers, Holy Staffs, Nature Staffs, Quarterstaffs, Spears, Swords, Helmets, Armors, Gathering Gear, Mounts, Disarray), Fixes.

sections.heading: Gathering Changes
sections.description: Several changes to higher-tier resources intended to make high-level gathering more rewarding.
items: Overall amount of T6, T7, and T8 resources in the world increased by 20%

Small Nodes now again behave as they did with the Queen update: spawn with a single charge and charge up over time if not gathered; respawn time decreased accordingly (reverting Queen Patch 5 behavior)
Shifted the overall large-to-small ratio to be more in favor of Large Nodes
Total number of Tier 8 nodes reduced by 75%; Large T8 Nodes (27 charges) respawn rate increased by 200%; Small T8 Nodes (2 charges) respawn rate increased by 500%
Overall amount of Tier 7 nodes reduced by 50%; Big T7 nodes (23 charges) respawn rate increased by 180%; Small T7 nodes (3 charges) respawn rate increased by 290%
Number of T6 nodes in T8 clusters increased by 100%
Number of T6 nodes in T7 clusters increased by 33%
Chance for Tier 7 and 8 animals to drop a cub has been decreased accordingly, as they now spawn more quickly — overall drop rates remain the same
sections.searchable_text: Gathering Changes T6 T7 T8 resources 20% Small Nodes single charge Large Nodes T8 75% reduced 200% 500% respawn T7 50% 180% 290% T6 clusters 100% 33% animals cub drop rate

sections.heading: Changes to Faction Flagging in Yellow Zones
sections.description: Players flagged hostile and players flagged for Faction Warfare can no longer attack each other in yellow zones. They are now neutral to each other, meaning they cannot cast any spells on each other, whether harmful or beneficial.
items: Hostile and faction-flagged players in yellow zones are neutral to each other — cannot cast any spells on each other, whether harmful or beneficial
Faction-flagged players can still kill and be killed by other faction-flagged players in all zones, including blue and yellow
Hostile players in yellow zones can still attack (and be attacked by) other non-faction-flagged players
Exception: hostile and faction-flagged players can attack each other with knockdown rules in unrestricted PvP areas in yellow zones (such as the circled areas around treasure chests)
sections.searchable_text: Faction Flagging Yellow Zones hostile faction warfare neutral spells blue yellow zones treasure chests unrestricted PvP knockdown

sections.heading: Outlands Invisibility Shrine Changes
items: Click priority updated: shrines are now clicked before any player corpses in the immediate area
Once a shrine has been activated, the player can then click on and loot dead players in the immediate area
Looting (as with other activities like skinning/gathering) will deactivate the invisibility buff but leave the silence buff active
sections.searchable_text: Outlands Invisibility Shrine click priority corpses loot looting skinning gathering invisibility buff silence buff

sections.heading: Hellgate Changes
items: Outlands Greater (5v5) Hellgates now always respawn every 10 minutes
Outlands Lesser (2v2) Hellgates now always respawn every 6 minutes
The loot of the Vicious Overlord and the Demonic Chest are now protected for 2 minutes for the party dealing the most respective damage to each
Hitpoints of the Demonic Chest increased from 2000 to 6000
Demonic Chest now has the same amount of armor and magic resistance as the other demons
Fame of Veteran Trapped Demons reduced by 50%; this Fame has been moved to the Vicious Overlord and the Demonic Chest
sections.searchable_text: Hellgate Changes Greater 5v5 10 minutes Lesser 2v2 6 minutes Vicious Overlord Demonic Chest loot protection 2 minutes Hitpoints 2000 6000 armor magic resistance Veteran Trapped Demons Fame 50%

sections.heading: New Avatar Rings Available
sections.description: Added 4 new avatar rings to the vanity shop, purchasable with 2 Adventurer's Tokens at the Vanity Merchant in all Royal Continent cities.
items: Nature Spirit
Inferno
Enigma
Crossed Blades
sections.searchable_text: New Avatar Rings vanity shop Adventurer's Tokens Vanity Merchant Royal Continent Nature Spirit Inferno Enigma Crossed Blades

sections.heading: Hideout Item Recovery Fee Reduced
items: Significantly reduced the cost of recovery of items from Hideouts — applies to Hideouts that have been destroyed, as well as Hideouts to which a player no longer has access
sections.searchable_text: Hideout Item Recovery Fee Reduced cost destroyed access

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Arcane Staffs Bows Crossbows Daggers Frost Staffs Hammers Holy Staffs Nature Staffs Quarterstaffs Spears Swords Helmets Armors Gathering Gear Mounts Disarray

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Void Malevolent Locus Energy cost Max Energy Cooldown Item Power 1200 1700

changes.raw_text: Void (Malevolent Locus): Energy cost: 21 base energy → 20% of Max Energy (independent of Item Power). Cooldown now scales with Item Power: 1200 IP: 48s → 45s; 1700 IP: 42s → 39s
notes: Energy cost changed from 21 base energy to 20% of Max Energy (independent of Item Power)
Cooldown now scales with Item Power

subsections.heading: Bows and Crossbows
subsections.searchable_text: Bows Crossbows Normal Attack projectile speed Explosive Mine Weeping Repeater indication area Projectile Speed 30 50

changes.raw_text: Increased projectile speed of all normal attacks — does not affect Attack Interval or DPS, just how much time it takes for the projectile to hit the target once shot
notes: Increased projectile speed of all normal attacks — does not affect Attack Interval or DPS, only projectile travel time

changes.raw_text: Explosive Mine (Weeping Repeater): Added an indication area to show where the mine is deployed. Projectile Speed of mine: 30 → 50
notes: Added an indication area to show where the mine is deployed

subsections.heading: Daggers
subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Normal Attacks One-handed Dagger Attack Interval Damage Dual Daggers Deathgivers Attack Range Claws Black Hands Bloodletter Infiltration removed Deadly Swipe added Dash Cooldown Energy Range Forbidden Stab Hit delay Standtime Throwing Blades Chain Slash Poison Coating Bloodthirsty Blade rework

changes.raw_text: One-handed Dagger: Attack Interval: 0.91s → 0.5s; Damage per Attack: 1.31 → 0.72

changes.ability: Normal Attack — Dual Daggers and Deathgivers:
changes.raw_text: Dual Daggers and Deathgivers: Attack Interval: 0.91s → 0.4s; Damage per Attack: 43 → 19; Attack Range: 2m → 1.5m

changes.ability: Normal Attack — Claws and Black Hands:
changes.raw_text: Claws and Black Hands: Attack Interval: 0.91s → 0.5s; Damage per Attack: 43 → 23
Bloodletter: Attack Interval: 0.83s → 0.6s; Damage per Attack: 1.15 → 0.83

Removed Ability: Infiltration (W-slot / all Daggers). Added new Ability: Deadly Swipe (Q-slot / all Daggers) — Leap towards the targeted area and deal 75 physical damage to all enemies in a 3m radius. Applies one stack of Assassin Spirit on yourself per enemy hit.
notes: Removed Ability: Infiltration (W-slot / all Daggers)

Added new Ability: Deadly Swipe (Q-slot / all Daggers) — Leap towards the targeted area and deal 75 physical damage to all enemies in a 3m radius. Applies one stack of Assassin Spirit on yourself per enemy hit.

changes.raw_text: Dash: Cooldown (1200 IP): 12.5s → 17.5s; Cooldown (1700 IP): 10s → 15s; Energy cost: 5 base energy → 5% max energy; Range: 11m → 8m; At the end of the Dash the player now gets a 15% damage increase that lasts for 4s
notes: At the end of the Dash the player now gets a 15% damage increase that lasts for 4s

changes.raw_text: Forbidden Stab (all Daggers): Hit delay: 0.2s → 0.1s; Standtime: 0.4s → 0.2s
Throwing Blades (all Daggers): Damage per Blade: 21.21 → 35.00
Chain Slash (all Daggers): Cooldown: 15s → 12s

Poison Coating (One-handed Dagger): Reworked the ability, now called 'Bloodthirsty Blade'. While active, every normal attack deals additional magic damage, and inflicted damage is stolen to heal yourself. Additionally, move speed is increased by 30%. However, while active you also lose 4% of your max health every second. The ability can last up to 6s but can be deactivated earlier.
notes: Ability reworked and renamed from 'Poison Coating' to 'Bloodthirsty Blade'
While active, every normal attack deals additional magic damage and inflicted damage is stolen to heal yourself
Move speed increased by 30% while active
Lose 4% of max health every second while active
Can last up to 6s but can be deactivated earlier

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Hoarfrost Damage Cast Time Radius Hit Delay Cast Range Ice Shard Damage vs Mobs

changes.raw_text: Hoarfrost (all Frost Staffs): Damage: 103.41 → 150; Cast Time: 1.5s → 2s; Radius: 3m → 4m; Hit Delay: 0.2s → 0.1s; Cast Range: 11m → 14m
Ice Shard (all Frost Staffs): Damage vs Mobs: 125 → 90

subsections.heading: Hammers
subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Ground Pound Grovekeeper Stun Duration

changes.raw_text: Ground Pound (Grovekeeper): Stun Duration: 3.25 seconds → 2.5 seconds

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Holy Explosion Great Holy Staff Knockback Distance speed Hit delay

changes.raw_text: Holy Explosion (Great Holy Staff): Now only the first hit knocks back; Knockback Distance: 6.36m → 15.00m; Knockback speed: 8 → 15; Hit delay: 0.1s → 0.4s
notes: Now only the first hit knocks back

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Revitalize Disruption Factor channel damage

changes.raw_text: Revitalize (all Nature Staffs): Disruption Factor: 0 → 5 (This means the channel can be reduced by incoming damage)
notes: The channel can now be reduced by incoming damage

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Fatal Blade Black Monk Staff channel instant area duration

changes.raw_text: Fatal Blade (Black Monk Staff): Removed the channel — now an instant ability that leaves the spinning blade on the ground while the player can keep moving. Area duration: 3s → 5s
notes: Removed the channel — it is now an instant ability that leaves the spinning blade on the ground while the player can keep moving

subsections.heading: Spears
subsections.searchable_text: Spears Inner Focus Move Speed Bonus per stack

changes.raw_text: Inner Focus (all Spears): Move Speed Bonus per stack: 8% → 5%

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Soulless Stream Galatine Pair Hitbox Range gaps damage area

changes.raw_text: Soulless Stream (Galatine Pair): Made the gaps in the damage area wider, and thus less likely to hit huge numbers of players. Hitbox Range: 13m → 12m. Hitbox is now visible ingame.
notes: Made the gaps in the damage area wider, and thus less likely to hit huge numbers of players
Hitbox is now visible ingame

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Nasty Wounds Hood of Tenacity Healing Output

changes.raw_text: Nasty Wounds (Hood of Tenacity): Now also reduces Healing Output by 50%
notes: Now also reduces Healing Output by 50%

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Fear Aura Fiend Robe Channel Duration Levitate Cultist Robe Heal per Tick Energy per Tick Energy Emission Robe of Purity Duration Requite Armor of Valor uninterruptible

changes.raw_text: Fear Aura (Fiend Robe): Channel Duration: 4s → 3s
Levitate (Cultist Robe): Heal per Tick: 4% → 3%; Energy per Tick: 4% → 3%
Energy Emission (Robe of Purity): Duration: 7s → 5s
Requite (Armor of Valor): The channel is now uninterruptible
notes: The channel is now uninterruptible

subsections.heading: Gathering Gear
subsections.searchable_text: Gathering Gear Flee Miner Workboots Buff Duration Silence Duration Ethereal Path Harvester Workboots cleanses Cast Range Sprint Duration Sprint Shield Lumberjack Workboots Shield Strength Move Speed channel Motivating Pain Quarrier Workboots Duration

changes.raw_text: Flee (Miner Workboots): Buff Duration: 7s → 10s; Silence Duration: 12s → 13s
Ethereal Path (Harvester Workboots): Now cleanses yourself upon activation. Cast Range: 14m → 16m; Sprint Duration: 4s → 7s
notes: Now cleanses yourself upon activation

changes.raw_text: Sprint Shield (Lumberjack Workboots): Shield Strength: 131.51 → 300; Move Speed Increase: 60% → 80%; The ability is now a channel (this means it can no longer be purged)
notes: The ability is now a channel — it can no longer be purged

changes.raw_text: Motivating Pain (Quarrier Workboots): Duration: 8s → 10s

subsections.heading: Mounts — Carry Weight
subsections.searchable_text: Mounts Carry Weight Bonus equipping dismounted dungeons Item Power Giant Stag Frost Ram Mule Riding Horse Spectral Bonehorse Giant Horse Direboar Wild Boar Spectral Direboar Swamp Dragon Swamp Salamander Avalonian Basilisk Pest Lizard

changes.raw_text: Carry Weight Bonus now applies just by equipping the mount, even when dismounted or in a dungeon. Scales with mount Item Power.
notes: Carry Weight Bonus is now active just by equipping the mount, even when dismounted, after being dismounted, when entering a dungeon, etc.
Excludes transport mounts and battle mounts
Scales with the mount's Item Power; also adjusts load progression over tiers

subsections.heading: Mounts — Abilities
subsections.searchable_text: Mount Abilities Large Multishot Ballista Cast Time Leap Frost Ram Cooldown Beetle Buzz Colossus Beetle Radius

changes.raw_text: Large Multishot (Ballista): Cast Time: 1s → 0.6s
Leap (Frost Ram): Cooldown: 30s → 15s
Beetle Buzz (Colossus Beetle): Cast Time: 0.5s → 1s; Radius: 10m → 9m

subsections.heading: Disarray
subsections.searchable_text: Disarray Zerg Debuff Defense Reduction removed CC Duration Received Healing escalation rate player threshold damage bonus

changes.raw_text: Defense Reduction has been removed and replaced with reduced CC Duration and reduced Received Healing. Escalation rate per additional player increased accordingly. Debuffed attributes: Bonus Damage vs. Players, CC Duration vs. Players, Received Healing.
notes: Defense Reduction has been removed from debuffed attributes
Replaced with: reduced CC Duration vs. Players and reduced Received Healing
Escalation rate per additional player increased accordingly
Debuffed attributes are now: Bonus Damage vs. Players, CC Duration vs. Players, Received Healing
Previous iteration made large fights focused on one-shot builds; splitting one group could remove the debuff entirely

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed an issue where the Alliance Fame Drain introduced with Patch 7 was also reducing Fame earned from PvP
Fixed an issue where some flat, open areas in steppe zones did not allow building of Hideouts
Thorns (Nature Staffs): reflected damage now corresponds to damage inflicted by enemy
Devastating Strike (Black Hands): second hit now strikes targets more reliably
Raging Storm (Bow of Badon): now interrupts enemy casts as intended
Fire Artillery (Fire Staffs): damage over time effect can now be removed by Emergency Heal as intended
Animations and audio for numerous spells updated for more accurate spell effect feedback
Additional graphical, terrain, animation, UI, audio, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Alliance Fame Drain PvP steppe zones Hideouts Thorns Nature Staffs reflected damage Devastating Strike Black Hands Raging Storm Bow of Badon Fire Artillery Fire Staffs Emergency Heal animations audio spells graphical terrain UI localization
